name: staircase
description: An honest rendering layer between bursty production and a steady delivery SLA: verified wins are banked in a buffer and released on a cadence stakeholders can trust, with the full ledger one click beneath. Every project gets a .staircase/ folder — the shared expectations record for human and agent teammates alike — and a Staircase Manager steering subagent that infers real progress from footprints (ledgers, git, transcript tail — never claims) and steers the working session back on course only when drift is detected.
